# Design System

## Purpose

This document summarizes the Praxis360 Design System.

For the complete design documentation, see:

- Docs/DesignBible.md
- Docs/MotionGuide.md

---

## Design Philosophy

Praxis360 delivers a premium, elegant and reassuring experience.

Design inspiration:

- Apple
- Revolut
- Notion

Every interface should feel:

- Clean
- Modern
- Consistent
- Simple
- Professional

---

## Core Principles

Always:

- Reuse existing UI components.
- Use generous spacing.
- Keep interfaces uncluttered.
- Maintain visual consistency.
- Follow the existing component library.

Never:

- Duplicate UI.
- Introduce new visual styles without updating the Design Bible.
- Create inconsistent layouts.

---

## Standard Components

Foundation

- P360Card
- P360Button (future)
- P360Badge (future)
- P360SearchBar (future)
- P360Dialog (future)

Business

- DocumentCard
- DocumentList
- CategoryCard

---

## Motion

Animations must follow Docs/MotionGuide.md.

Motion should always support usability, never decoration.

---
